title: 『今宵の月は満月か、三日月か』

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...That was no good either. Even I can tell. It
didn't feel right at all.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: But still...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh! Are you training too, Maruzen?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey there, Spe. I am! I'm putting my all into it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, if you're training too, why don't we go
partner running?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: H-huh?! Me? Partner running? With you?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'd love to! Gosh, I'm so happy to have a chance
like this! I'll run with everything I've got!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Sakura Chiyono O and I have stopped by
a cafe to have a meeting over lunch.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
What are you going to order, Trainer? Look, they
have hot dogs!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oops! I'm so sorry about what happened at the
Fan Fest... I really put you through a lot back
there...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
How about a salad? We could both get carrot
salads, and then we'd be twinsies! Hehe.
choice_data_list: Is just a salad going to be enough for you?
Is just a salad going to be enough for you?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Lately, there have been days where I feel tired of
eating.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
My body feels heavy, too... Hehe. I think my body
is telling me to go on a diet.
choice_data_list:
You feel tired of eating, and your body is
heavy?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, she didn't want any
takoyaki during New Year's either because she
wasn't hungry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I heard someone talking about
something similar before...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I've alway hadda light appetite, but now I'm
gettin' fuller even faster. And my legs've been
weirdly heavy lately, so I'm takin' a break.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
To be honest with ya, this might be it for me... My
body could be tryin' to tell me, "Hey, you're done
here."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Tamamo Cross said pretty much the
same thing during her press interview.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, but it's not a big deal. Really, it's not even
that bad!
choice_data_list: But what if that means you're—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a certain stage in an Umamusume's life
where her body and racing capabilities begin
growing rapidly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is the moment when her skills as a
competitive racer awaken, so the state is known
as being "race-ready."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When Umamusume become race-ready, they start
to feel new potential well up in their bodies.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They go through many changes. Their bodies feel
light, they can run on and on without getting
tired, and their appetites become insatiable.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Competitive racers train hard during this period
to maximize their growth and tackle big racing
goals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Conversely, when Umamusume's legs start feeling
heavy... When their body won't move how they
want, and their appetite declines...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a sign they've passed their racing peak, and
are approaching the sunset of their career.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Are you trying to say that I'm in decline?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But it's barely the spring of my senior year. How
can I already be past my peak?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: That can't be...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
choice_data_list: We can talk about this again some other time.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Okay.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: The sunset is so beautiful...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ah... So the sun is already setting...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Spe, but could we go one more time? Just
once more, please!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff... Wheeze... Yeah... I can totally go again!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear, I'm sorry to push you so far! But I'm
almost done, so hang in there!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...I made Chiyo a promise, so I'll do everything I
can.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Maruzen...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Maruzen, I...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I-it's been quite a surprise, but despite always
thinking I was normal, it turns out there's
something unusual about me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It seems I'm one of those Umamusume who goes
into full bloom early and withers away just as
fast...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But since you're incredibly strong, someone as
average as me has to work way harder than
average.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
If I want to catch up to you, I'll first have to get
faster and improve my stamina.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to be aware of my position in races and
stick things through until the very end...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: But if my peak really is behind me, then...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Trainer, may I ask you a favor, please?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: It's about my training plans from now on.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I, um... Even if I were in decline, I've only just started declining, right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
So I bet if I train hard, I should be able to
maintain my strength close to what my peak
levels are!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Besides, there's a chance I haven't passed my
peak yet.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It's way too early to say what's happening just
because I'm feeling a bit off. It might just be
exhaustion!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: So... so, listen!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
This is the moment I should be digging in my heels
and working even harder, not giving up! So how
about we increase my training?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yes! Thank you! I'll do my best!
choice_data_list:
You have to be careful not to get hurt, though,
okay?

You have to be careful not to get hurt, though,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Right. I will. I can't afford to get hurt...
especially not now.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm going pour every drop of energy I have into
training from now on!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: So... do you think I still have a chance?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Do you think I can still become her rival?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the light of the setting sun bleeds in through
the windows, Sakura Chiyono O's voice echoes
somewhat emptily through the room...
